name: Rod of Resurrection
reqAttune: by a cleric, druid, or paladin
entries: The rod has 5 charges. While you hold it, you can cast one of the following spells from it: {@spell Heal|XPHB} (expends 1 charge) or {@spell Resurrection|XPHB} (expends 5 charges).
The rod regains 1 expended charge daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll {@dice 1d20}. On a 1, the rod disappears in a harmless burst of radiance.
